scene_description:
### Foreground (Closest to Camera)
- **Road Surface & Markings**: A two-lane asphalt road occupies the central foreground. A solid white line runs along the right edge (separating the road from the parking area), and a dashed white line divides the two lanes. The road surface is smooth with minor patches.  
- **Vehicles & Plates**: A silver sedan is in the left lane, moving away from the camera. No license plate details are visible. On the right side (in the parking area), a silver sedan, a dark gray SUV, and a light gray SUV are parked. License plates on these vehicles are unreadable.  
- **People**: A woman wearing dark clothing is crossing the road in the right foreground (near the corner of the parking area and the road). Three people stand near the building’s entrance (on the right side, near the parked cars).  
- **Text & Signs**: A small sign with “20” (white background, black Latin script) is mounted on a pole near the building’s entrance (right side, mid-foreground). A blue street sign on a pole (right side, near the building) is visible but text is unreadable.  

### Mid-Ground
- **Buildings & Architecture**: A two-story, pink stucco building dominates the right side. The ground floor has shop windows: one displays “TES” (black Latin script on a white background) with a graphic below; another adjacent sign also shows “TES” with product images. The upper floor has rectangular windows with white trim, and some windows feature small white balcony railings. The building has a flat roof.  
- **Infrastructure**:  
  - **Utility Poles**: Multiple wooden utility poles line the right side, with numerous black power lines crossing horizontally. Some poles have transformers and insulators.  
  - **Street Lamps**: A gray, single-armed street lamp with a rectangular lamp head is positioned on the left side of the road (center of the image).  
  - **Guardrails**: A white metal railing with vertical bars runs along the riverbank on the left side, separating the road from the water.  
- **Vegetation & Terrain**: On the left side, a well-maintained grassy area with red flowering plants borders the road. A tall palm tree stands in the left mid-ground (next to the grassy area). Further down the road, additional palm trees are visible near the river.  
- **Vehicles & Plates**: A silver sedan is in the left lane (further down the road, mid-ground). No license plate details are visible.  

### Background
- **Road Surface & Markings**: The road continues into the distance with a dashed white center line and solid white edge lines.  
- **Buildings & Architecture**: A taller, modern building is partially visible behind the pink building (left side of the pink structure).  
- **Vegetation & Terrain**: Beyond the river (left side), a distant tree line and low-lying land are visible under an overcast sky. Boats are present on the river.  
- **Sky**: The sky is covered with thick, gray clouds (no direct sunlight).  
- **Additional Elements**: Distant vehicles (including a red car) are visible on the road further in the background. A small blue boat is on the river (left side, background).  

### Key Notes (Absences)
- No fire hydrants, traffic lights, or bollards are visible.  
- No readable license plate characters are present.  
- No additional text (beyond “20” and “TES”) is legible.  
- No street name or other contextual text is readable (beyond the “20” sign and shop “TES” signs).

details.name: shop sign
details.reason: The use of Latin script helps identify the region's alphabet.
details.focused_description: The shop sign displays the text "TESS" in uppercase English letters. The letters are dark-colored (black or dark gray) against a light background. The text is in a bold, blocky font. The sign appears to be printed or painted on a glass surface, with no visible damage or wear. The word "TESS" is the sole text on the sign.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The presence of transformers and insulators can indicate specific regional electrical infrastructure.
details.focused_description: The wooden utility pole is cylindrical in shape, with its lower section painted white and the upper section displaying weathered, natural brown wood. It features a crossarm at the top supporting multiple electrical wires, and additional wires are tightly wrapped around the pole's body. The wood shows signs of aging and exposure, with visible discoloration and weathering. The pole stands on a concrete base at street level.
